entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., the crop studied for ergot reaction

entities.name: ERGOT
entities.description: A fungal disease caused by Claviceps fusiformis Loveless affecting pearl millet

entities.name: CLAVICEPS FUSIFORMIS
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes ergot in pearl millet

entities.name: ERGOT SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The degree to which pearl millet hybrids are prone to ergot infection

entities.name: A1 CYTOPLASM
entities.description: Cytoplasm of male-sterile lines associated with increased ergot susceptibility

entities.name: MALE FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of the plant to produce viable pollen, which is reduced in A-lines

entities.name: SELFED SEEDSET
entities.description: The percentage of seeds produced through self-pollination

entities.name: NUCLEAR GENETIC FACTORS
entities.description: Genetic elements in the nucleus of female parents that influence ergot resistance

entities.name: ICRISAT ASIA CENTER
entities.description: The site where disease nurseries were established and hybrids were evaluated

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: The process of mating pollen parents with A-lines and B-lines to create hybrids
